providerEventTypes.unknownDisposition: journal first, emit one explicit unsupportedVisible diagnostic, never silently drop

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Create a Claude task, send one message, receive one final answer, reopen it.

orderingAndCardinality: active before terminal, idle after terminal
scenarios.reconnectRestart: thread/read and thread/resume materialize the same completed turn without replay duplicates

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Approve one command, disconnect on a later pending approval, reconnect and resolve it from App.
providerInputs: canUseTool callback pending until App decision
orderingAndCardinality: stable durable identity with connection-local numeric ID

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Open /side during an active parent, complete two side turns, return to the still-running parent.
providerInputs: forkSession at stable boundary
no-query parent snapshot
no-query injected side boundary
two model-visible side inputs
orderingAndCardinality: fork RPC returns before side turn
side is not broadcast into durable sidebar
replayed prelude boundary UUID is monotonic and cannot be overwritten by a stale service snapshot
scenarios.reconnectRestart: The gateway retains the process-owned side while alive, but the current App relaunch sends no RPC naming the existing side ID. Parent reconnect remains independent and succeeds.
tests: tests/claude/service.test.ts#runs the complete captured Full Access side, child, settings, and reconnect lifecycle
scenarios.gap: EXTERNAL APP BLOCKER: existing side history cannot be rediscovered because App persists/sends no side thread ID after relaunch and materializes fork history as empty turns. Desktop also hides /side while an approval plaque is pending, so side and approval remain separate mandatory App scenarios.

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Change effort/model/speed/permissions while background work is active; current turn finishes, next turn uses the latest selection.
providerInputs: current Query keeps frozen applied settings
durable next Query resumes with latest desired settings; ephemeral next turn applies public controls to the same Query before input
scenarios.reconnectRestart: latest desired settings persist; restart invents neither a failed settings turn nor an old picker value

tests/claude/service.test.ts#does not retire a settings-stale runtime while its background Bash and output tailer can continue
tests/claude/service.test.ts#keeps a settings-stale runtime leased while a subagent is nonterminal
tests/claude/service.test.ts#switches model, effort, and speed between ephemeral turns without replacing provider context
tests/claude/service.test.ts#defers last-write-wins ephemeral controls until the active lifecycle drains
tests/claude/service.test.ts#does not submit an ephemeral turn when a provider control fails and converges on retry
tests/claude/service.test.ts#live-applies max effort while retaining initialization-bound ephemeral settings
tests/claude/service.test.ts#uses the latest ephemeral permission policy after switching out of full access
scenarios.gap: POINT UI ACCEPTANCE: existing side captures preserve a fixed Sonnet/High selection but do not yet show one post-input Sonnet↔Opus or effort change with remembered context.

cleanup and repeated Stop are idempotent

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Run Compact, wait through a long provider compaction, optionally Stop it, then continue the task.

scenarios.gap: No sanitized real App compact capture is committed; automated service regressions are the contract oracle.

orderingAndCardinality: stale probes cannot overwrite newer message/compact generations

scenarios.computerUseScenario: Background completion wakes the same turn after a delayed requesting TTFT; Stop/reconnect during the delay.

orderingAndCardinality: one request generation acknowledges covered notifications

scenarios.gap: Manual App delayed-TTFT/Stop/reconnect remains unproven: the Sonnet attempt reached provider output too quickly, and the follow-up lab quota fell to 2%. The captured 6047 ms race remains covered deterministically.

providerInputs: native source-provider compact/handoff
fresh hidden target session receiving the original user input exactly once
providerEvents: target-provider lifecycle projected onto the stable public thread id
orderingAndCardinality: source epoch is sealed only after target turn delivery
original user input is delivered exactly once
fork selects the provider epoch containing the chosen completed turn

knownRacePermutations: provider result before/after background task notification
settings update before/after result and before lifecycle quiescence
interrupt concurrent with task completion, approval resolution and autonomous request
side no-query acknowledgement before/after first real side message_start
side prelude replay UUID update followed by stale service snapshot write
usage probe completion after message_start, compact, interrupt, next turn, retirement or shutdown
compact boundary before/after status idle and duplicate/late compact boundary
rollback provider fork completion after concurrent source revision mutation
goal runtime materialization after delete/archive/shutdown or goal generation replacement
rate-limit refresh/event after runtime replacement or connection foreground change
title system-ephemeral worker concurrent with first durable Claude turn
duplicate provider UUID and duplicate effect/server-request resolution

unsupportedUiDifferences.behavior: Desktop /side is hidden while an approval plaque is pending
unsupportedUiDifferences.contract: validate active /side and approval+Stop as two separate mandatory scenarios

unsupportedUiDifferences.behavior: Built-in /status card always uses OpenAI frontend HTTP
unsupportedUiDifferences.contract: never mislabel it as Claude; use CCodex status for provider-correct data
show generic Thinking; do not synthesize semantic reasoning

unsupportedUiDifferences.behavior: Initialization-only ephemeral settings after first model-visible turn
unsupportedUiDifferences.contract: model, low/medium/high/xhigh effort, fast mode and permissions use same-Query controls; cwd, output schema, personality and collaboration instructions return precise invalid-params errors rather than discard side context

unsupportedUiDifferences.behavior: Switching an existing ephemeral session into max effort
unsupportedUiDifferences.contract: preserve max when selected at session creation, but reject a later transition into max because the public dynamic effort control supports only low/medium/high/xhigh

unsupportedUiDifferences.behavior: Externally RPC-created empty task opens with App-local picker defaults
unsupportedUiDifferences.owner: Codex App local UI state; same behavior observed with stock
unsupportedUiDifferences.contract: do not invent resume/settings notifications solely to override the empty selector
